Renovations | Sale

Sale renovations with calmer palettes and tighter material control.

Sale projects respond well to a full bathroom renovations, kitchen installation and refurbishment, tiling including large format, wet showers and exterior areas, carpentry, and interior and exterior wall systems studio scope delivered with restrained palettes and tighter detailing.

Sale Manchester and the North West Plan | Design | Craft

Location Focus

Sale projects shaped by detail, not generic packages.

For Sale properties, the strongest results come from shaping full bathroom renovations, kitchen installation and refurbishment, tiling including large format, wet showers and exterior areas, carpentry, and interior and exterior wall systems into one quieter, more deliberate finish language.

Curated Scope

How the studio tends to shape work in Sale.

01

Material restraint

Tones and finishes are selected to feel composed rather than busy.

02

Craft control

Tile lines, trims and interfaces stay visually tight.

03

Broader scope

Bathrooms, kitchens and adjacent interior work can be planned together.

Selected Project

Material-led renovation detail

A finish-first scope where brick, tile and trim choices needed to feel richer without becoming loud.

Material palette discipline Selective room upgrades Premium finish control

FAQ

Questions we usually answer before a Sale brief starts.

Can you work with an existing palette?

Yes. We can refine a starting palette so the finished space reads more deliberate.

Do you only do full-home projects?

No. We also take on focused room scopes where the detail standard is right.

How do we start in Sale?

Use the same private consultation route and we will shape the brief from there.

Studio Contact

Discuss premium renovations in Sale directly with the studio.

Every local brief keeps the same direct contact route so scope, finish ambition and sequencing can be clarified without delay.

Private Consultation

Send Enquiry

Share the rooms involved, finish level and timing. The studio replies with the right next step.

Manchester and the North West Send Enquiry Plan | Design | Craft

Step 1

Start with the core enquiry.

Share who should hear back, how to reach you and what kind of project this is.

Step 2

Set the site and planning context.

This helps us frame the right next step before anyone gives you a generic estimate answer.

Rooms involved

Step 3

Finish the working brief.

Add the budget direction, must-haves, known constraints and any reference photos that will save a back-and-forth later.

Priorities

Optional: attach up to 8 reference photos.

Quote status

Your private quote link is ready.

Keep this private link to check the quote status later and continue from the same enquiry context.
